column19: If adding more blocks: make sure blocks are separated by exactly one row

column14: Sample (for sample wells: can use any name)
column19: Minimum of 1 design variable is necessary for analysis
Make sure to name your design variable(s) in the top-left cell of each block
Do not modify the "Well_type" cell text. The analysis will look for that specific format to detect the first block
Leave cells corresponding to empty wells empty
(Optional) Copy "Blank" wells from Well_type into each design variable block

column14: Design variable 1 identifiers (eg strain number for Strain)
Values can be any identifiers you choose (eg strain names/treatments/plate IDs etc)
Design variable 2 identifiers (eg treatment types for Treatment)
Values can be any identifiers you choose (eg strain names/treatments/plate IDs etc)
Design variable 3 identifiers (eg plate IDs for Plate ID)
Values can be any identifiers you choose (eg strain names/treatments/plate IDs etc)
